introMessage: Living in poor conditions is stressful. Let's work out what your landlord should be doing, and what you can do about it.

options.label: Cracks, collapsing ceiling, or structural damage

questions.text: When did you first notice the problem?
questions.helpText: This helps us understand how long you've been living with it.

questions.text: What type of tenant are you?
questions.helpText: This affects which rules apply to your landlord.

questions.text: Have you told your landlord about the problem?
questions.helpText: Your landlord is only legally responsible once they know about it. Reporting in writing is strongest.

options.label: Yes, but only verbally or by phone
Yes, through an online portal or app

questions.helpText: This tells us whether they've met their legal obligations.

options.label: They did some work but the problem remains
They ignored me or haven't responded
They blamed me for the problem

questions.text: How long has your landlord been failing to act?
questions.helpText: The longer a landlord ignores a problem they know about, the stronger your case. Over 3 months is a significant breach.

questions.text: Is the problem affecting your health?
questions.helpText: Health impact strengthens your case significantly. See your GP if you can. It creates evidence.
Don't worry if you don't have much. We'll help you build your evidence.

options.label: Photos or videos of the problem
Emails or letters to/from my landlord

questions.text: What do you want to happen?

options.label: I want compensation for what I've been through
I want a rent reduction until it's fixed
I want to be moved to another property

strong.message: Based on what you've told us, your landlord may be in breach of their legal obligations. Here's what to do next.

maybe.message: You may have grounds to take action. The key is making sure your landlord has been properly notified in writing.

difficult.message: Your case may need more evidence before you can take formal action. Here are the steps to strengthen your position.
